message: The 'feels>>' era 🫠 You're literally just lying there doing NOTHING and still managing to look like a whole movie scene. How. Explain. I'm waiting. 💀💖

7pm on a random evening and you're just casually laying against the bedsheet looking like this 😭 The stare, the vibes, the DRAMA — no effort, no occasion, just pure main character energy for absolutely no reason. Unfair. 🌸🖤
The big eyes. The chin on the hands. The look that makes zero sense to be this cute 😩✨ You weren't even trying and here we are. I hate it here. (I love it here.) 💗
GLASSES. PINK SHIRT. THAT SMILE. 🤓💘 The 'lowkey' era but make it devastating for everyone who sees this. You smiled and I completely lost my mind, so that's cool. No further questions 😮‍💨
A black & white selfie like you're the main character of an indie film 🎬🤍 Somewhere between 'I'm fine' and 'I have 14 unread messages and a whole vibe going on'… and somehow both are valid 😭✨
Two moods, one person, infinite chaos 😂🖤 Top photo: 'I'm so calm and mysterious ✨' — Bottom photo: GREMLIN MODE ACTIVATED 😈 Both are 10/10. I can't choose. I won't. 🫶
"Honey" 🍯✨ Sitting there with the plants and soft aesthetic — like you casually walked into a Pinterest board and stayed 💕🌿

THE EYES. Just the eyes. No context needed, no explanation given — and somehow it's more devastating than a full photo 😭🔥 You could communicate an entire novel with that stare and I would read every single word. Unfair doesn't even begin to cover it. 👁️👁️💀

Bun up, shades down, pout activated — the 'don't talk to me' era but make it fashion 😎✨ Peeking over those sunglasses like you OWN every room you walk into. Backpack on, heart on the frames, and somehow still the coolest person in any crowd. I'm not okay. 🖤💫
